questions.text: What is your primary clinical specialty?
questions.description: Select the specialty that best describes your current practice.

questions.text: Approximately how many patients do you currently manage on a biologic therapy?
questions.description: Enter your best estimate. Include all active patients across indications.

questions.text: In the past 12 months, have you initiated a patient on a biosimilar as a first-line biologic therapy (not a switch from an originator)?

options.text: Not applicable — I do not prescribe biologics

questions.text: Which of the following factors most influence your decision to prescribe a biosimilar over an originator biologic?

options.text: My own confidence in the biosimilar's efficacy and safety profile

questions.text: What are your primary barriers to prescribing biosimilars in your practice?

options.text: Lack of long-term real-world safety data
Patient resistance to switching from an originator
Insufficient education or familiarity with available biosimilars
No significant barriers — I prescribe biosimilars routinely

questions.text: For each of the following biosimilar classes, how would you rate your current confidence in prescribing?
How would you characterize your institution's current policy on biosimilar substitution without prescriber notification?

options.text: Permitted — substitution occurs automatically at the pharmacy level
Permitted with notification — I am informed after substitution
Not permitted — substitution requires my explicit approval
No formal policy exists at my institution
I am not aware of my institution's policy
